root_text.an4.129:1.3: Sace, bhikkhave, bhikkhuparisā ānandaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.129:1.4: Tatra ce ānando dhammaṁ bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.129:1.5: Atittāva, bhikkhave, bhikkhuparisā hoti, atha ānando tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.129:2.1: Sace, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniparisā ānandaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.129:2.2: Tattha ce ānando dhammaṁ bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.129:2.3: Atittāva, bhikkhave, bhikkhuniparisā hoti, atha ānando tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.129:3.1: Sace, bhikkhave, upāsakaparisā ānandaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.129:3.2: Tatra ce ānando dhammaṁ bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.129:3.3: Atittāva, bhikkhave, upāsakaparisā hoti, atha ānando tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.129:4.1: Sace, bhikkhave, upāsikāparisā ānandaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamati, dassanenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.129:4.2: Tatra ce ānando dhammaṁ bhāsati, bhāsitenapi sā attamanā hoti.
root_text.an4.129:4.3: Atittāva, bhikkhave, upāsikāparisā hoti, atha ānando tuṇhī bhavati.
root_text.an4.129:4.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro acchariyā abbhutā dhammā ānande”ti.

translation_text.an4.129:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these four incredible and amazing things about Ānanda.
translation_text.an4.129:1.3: If an assembly of monks goes to see Ānanda, they’re uplifted by seeing him
translation_text.an4.129:1.4: and uplifted by hearing him speak.
translation_text.an4.129:1.5: And when he falls silent, they’ve never had enough.
translation_text.an4.129:4.1: or laywomen goes to see Ānanda, they’re uplifted by seeing him
translation_text.an4.129:4.2: and uplifted by hearing him speak.
translation_text.an4.129:4.3: And when he falls silent, they’ve never had enough.
translation_text.an4.129:4.4: These are the four incredible and amazing things about Ānanda.”
